Leverage Staked WEMIX (stWEMIX) rewards

Staking rewards for WEMIX with Wemix Liquid Stakinkg token is currently at 10~11% APY. Users can leverage staked WEMIX rewards as below:

1

Deposit stWEMIX

on Shoebill V2

2

Borrow WEMIX

3

Deposit WEMIX through WEMIX Fi and exchange to stWEMIX

4

Deposit stWEMIX to Shoebill V2 again

5

Repeat the other process

How does Shoebill return staking rewards cumulated to stWEMIX?

The stWEMIX exchange rate increases compared to WEMIX as rewards are accrued. Shoebill V2 returns the exact quantity of stWEMIX to the depositors.

How do I get stWEMIX?
